mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PERMISSION_LINE pl JOIN PERMISSION p ON p.permission_id = pl.permission_id WHERE pl.line_id = #{lineId} AND p.permission_id = 1 AND pl.is_enable = TRUE ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS isEnable, f.family_id AS familyId, f.pool_total_data AS sharedPoolTotalData FROM FAMILY_LINE fl JOIN FAMILY f ON f.family_id = fl.family_id WHERE fl.line_id = #{lineId}

SELECT u.user_id AS userId, l.line_id AS lineId, l.plan_id AS planId, u.user_name AS userName, l.phone AS phone, p.plan_name AS planName, l.remaining_data AS remainingData, p.basic_data_amount AS basicDataAmount, fl.role AS role, CASE WHEN COALESCE(ll.is_shared_limit_active, FALSE) = FALSE THEN f.pool_total_data ELSE ll.shared_data_limit END AS sharedPoolTotalAmount, CASE WHEN COALESCE(ll.is_shared_limit_active, FALSE) = FALSE THEN f.pool_remaining_data WHEN ll.shared_data_limit = -1 THEN -1 ELSE GREATEST( ll.shared_data_limit - COALESCE(fsu.monthly_shared_usage, 0), 0 ) END AS sharedPoolRemainingAmount, CASE WHEN l.line_id = #{lineId} THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS isMe FROM FAMILY_LINE fl JOIN LINE l ON fl.line_id = l.line_id JOIN USERS u ON l.user_id = u.user_id JOIN PLAN p ON l.plan_id = p.plan_id JOIN FAMILY f ON fl.family_id = f.family_id LEFT JOIN LINE_LIMIT ll ON ll.line_id = l.line_id AND ll.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN ( SELECT family_id, SUM(usage_amount) AS monthly_shared_usage FROM FAMILY_SHARED_USAGE_DAILY WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND family_id = #{familyId} GROUP BY family_id ) fsu ON fsu.family_id = f.family_id WHERE fl.family_id = #{familyId} AND l.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.deleted_at IS NULL AND f.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY CASE WHEN fl.role = 'OWNER' THEN 0 WHEN l.line_id = #{lineId} THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, l.line_id ASC;

SELECT l.line_id AS lineId, u.user_id AS userId, u.user_name AS userName, l.phone AS phone FROM FAMILY_LINE fl JOIN LINE l ON fl.line_id = l.line_id JOIN USERS u ON l.user_id = u.user_id JOIN FAMILY f ON f.family_id = fl.family_id WHERE fl.family_id = ( SELECT fl2.family_id FROM FAMILY_LINE fl2 WHERE fl2.line_id = #{lineId} ) AND l.deleted_at IS NULL AND f.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY CASE WHEN l.line_id = #{lineId} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, l.line_id ASC

SELECT l.line_id AS lineId, u.user_id AS userId, u.user_name AS userName, l.phone AS phone FROM FAMILY_LINE fl JOIN LINE l ON fl.line_id = l.line_id JOIN USERS u ON l.user_id = u.user_id JOIN FAMILY f ON f.family_id = fl.family_id WHERE fl.family_id = #{familyId} AND l.deleted_at IS NULL AND f.deleted_at IS NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM FAMILY_LINE fl2 WHERE fl2.family_id = #{familyId} AND fl2.line_id = #{lineId} ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN l.line_id = #{lineId} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, l.line_id ASC
SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PERMISSION_LINE pl JOIN PERMISSION p ON p.permission_id = pl.permission_id WHERE pl.line_id = #{lineId} AND p.permission_id = 2 AND pl.is_enable = TRUE )
SELECT fl.family_id FROM FAMILY_LINE fl JOIN FAMILY f ON f.family_id = fl.family_id WHERE fl.line_id = #{lineId} AND f.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT l.line_id AS lineId, u.user_id AS userId, u.user_name AS userName, l.phone AS phone, fl.role AS role FROM FAMILY_LINE fl JOIN LINE l ON fl.line_id = l.line_id JOIN USERS u ON l.user_id = u.user_id JOIN FAMILY f ON f.family_id = fl.family_id WHERE fl.family_id = #{familyId} AND l.deleted_at IS NULL AND f.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY CASE WHEN fl.role = 'OWNER' THEN 0 WHEN l.line_id = #{lineId} THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, l.line_id ASC
SELECT f.pool_base_data FROM FAMILY f JOIN FAMILY_LINE fl ON f.family_id = fl.family_id WHERE fl.line_id = #{lineId} AND f.deleted_at IS NULL
